feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Today we're talking about engineering communication, and I'm joined by Joll Wisenthal, staff engineer focused on platform teams.
Joll Wisenthal, thanks for being here.
